mapper.select: SELECT alc.user_id AS userId, u.avatar, u.nickname, alc.article_id AS articleId, alc.article_title AS articleTitle, alc.msg_type AS msgType, alc.create_time AS createTime FROM t_article_like_collect alc INNER JOIN t_user u ON alc.user_id = u.id WHERE alc.target_user_id = #{userId} AND alc.user_id != #{userId} AND alc.is_cancel = 0 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY alc.create_time DESC
